nodes.label: FR-005: Failure Accounting

nodes.description: System shall generate thumbnails for all supported still images using ImageMagick deterministic conversion

nodes.label: FR-007: HEIC Display Proxies

nodes.label: FR-008: RAW JPG Proxies

nodes.label: FR-009: Video Proxies

nodes.label: FR-011: Orphan Proxy Cleanup

nodes.label: FR-013: Gallery Creation Modes

nodes.label: FR-014: Gallery Metadata Rebuild

nodes.label: FR-015: Gallery Index Rebuild
nodes.description: System shall maintain single galleries index file with deterministic/idempotent rebuild, continue-on-error handling, and summary accounting

nodes.label: FR-016: Gallery Mutation Safety

nodes.label: FR-017: Structured Query Grammar

nodes.label: FR-018: Query Fields

nodes.label: FR-019: Query Operators

nodes.label: FR-020: Boolean Logic

nodes.label: FR-021: Query Validation Errors

nodes.label: FR-022: Query Behavior Documentation

nodes.label: FR-025: Person Management

nodes.label: FR-026: Face Overlays

nodes.label: FR-027: Clustering Modes

nodes.label: FR-032: Hard Delete
nodes.description: Hard delete shall require explicit user action and produce auditable operation summary

nodes.label: FR-033: UI Views
nodes.description: UI shall provide thumbnail grid, full-screen single view, metadata sidebar, and gallery selector

nodes.label: FR-034: Keyboard Workflow

nodes.label: FR-035: Touch Interaction

nodes.label: FR-036: Job Status Display
nodes.description: UI shall display long-running operation status with timestamped progress entries

nodes.label: FR-037: Sorting and Context Switching

nodes.label: FR-038: API Versioning
nodes.description: APIs shall be versioned under /api/v1
